name: Autonomyx Structured Data Parser
description: Parse JSON, CSV, XML, YAML, HTML tables, Markdown tables using actual Python parser code. No LLM needed for structured formats. Auto-detects format. Returns parsed JSON with record count.

node.description: Uses actual Python parser code — not LLM. Supports JSON, CSV, XML, YAML, HTML tables, Markdown tables.

important_notes: This flow uses actual Python parser code — NOT an LLM
For unstructured inputs (PDFs, Word docs, logs), extend with the unstructured library
Auto-detects: JSON, CSV, XML, YAML, Markdown tables
